LanguageData.BMAD_ShrinkTurret.description: A portable automatic turret with shrink ray attached. Its dumb AI brain can't be directly controlled, so beware of friendly fire.
LanguageData.BMAD_GrowthTurret.description: A portable automatic turret with growth ray attached. Its dumb AI brain can't be directly controlled, so beware of friendly fire.
LanguageData.BMAD_Gun_GrowthTurret.verbs.0.label: ㅤ
